title: ALVÉO
description: Title slide — Closet design, made precise.

title: The Problem
description: Closet design is a manual, time-consuming process.

title: The Solution
description: Alvéo generates a precision elevation drawing in seconds.

title: Key Features
description: Three capabilities: Configurator, Layout Engine, PDF/SVG Export.

title: Who It's For
description: Two distinct audiences: Homeowners and Interior Designers.

title: How It Works
description: Four-step process from space input to precision layout.

title: Built on Solid Ground
description: Technology stack: React, TypeScript, custom SVG engine, Replit Auth.
